post.body: I tidied my room today! With the help of my bro, we spent about 3 hrs at it and its tidy!! Now i gotta wait for dad to put TV on wall bracket. YAY :) Now my phone is on a little shelf thanks to my bro Other than that, not much else new. Manager called and told me i dont have to work tomorrw which is always nice. Though it does kinda mean i'll be workin everyday from Wed until Sunday. Aw well, I need the money. Things are goin well :) Check out new Audioscrobbler - LASTFM
